all_candidates.topic: Is Maharashtra TET exam paper leak concerning?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 14, 2026, Rahul Gandhi commented on the Maharashtra TET exam postponement due to a paper leak.

all_candidates.topic: Should Mumbai airport near-misses lead to stricter ATC?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 8, 2026, two Air India flights had a near-miss on the same runway at Mumbai airport.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven silent layoffs in IT justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports on July 9-14, 2026, indicated India's IT sector could see 35,000 'silent layoffs' driven by AI and productivity goals.

all_candidates.topic: Is IT sector's AI-driven workforce restructuring fair?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports on July 9-14, 2026, highlight the Indian IT sector's ongoing workforce restructuring, driven by AI integration.

all_candidates.topic: Is E20 petrol's costlier production justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Petroleum Ministry clarified on July 10, 2026, that E20 petrol is costlier to produce than pure petrol at current crude prices.

all_candidates.topic: Is E20 mileage reduction an acceptable trade-off?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The government admitted on July 10, 2026, that E20 petrol may reduce mileage by 3-5% in some vehicles.

all_candidates.topic: Will India-UK trade deal benefit everyone?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) came into force on July 15, 2026, eliminating tariffs on key Indian exports.

all_candidates.topic: Is UPI expansion to Indonesia beneficial?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 7, 2026, it was reported that UPI is set to expand to Indonesia to facilitate digital payments.

all_candidates.topic: Is GSTR-3B ITC auto-locking good for business?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From the July 2026 tax period, manual ITC adjustments in GSTR-3B will end, with auto-population becoming mandatory.

all_candidates.topic: Is CBSE three-language policy beneficial for students?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 14, 2026, CBSE clarified its three-language policy, requiring passing a third language for Class 10 certificates from 2027-28.

all_candidates.topic: Is mandatory APAAR ID for students beneficial?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 8, 2026, updates regarding CBSE mandatory APAAR ID policies were highlighted for students.

all_candidates.topic: Will Google's AI education initiatives be impactful?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 14-15, 2026, Google launched new AI education programs and initiatives for India's developers and startups.

all_candidates.topic: Are railway artisan skilling reforms good?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 14-15, 2026, Indian Railways unveiled reforms requiring certified artisans for railway projects.

all_candidates.topic: Is Rail Bhoomi app good for land acquisition?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Indian Railways launched the web-based 'Rail Bhoomi' app on July 14-15, 2026, to simplify and speed up land acquisition.

all_candidates.topic: Is carbon neutral transport goal achievable soon?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India concluded the 3rd BRICS Transport Ministers' Meeting on July 12, 2026, focusing on a carbon-neutral transport system.

all_candidates.topic: Is India's AI startup funding boom sustainable?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Indian startups raised $219 million in the week ended July 9, 2026, with AI infrastructure dominating funding deals.

all_candidates.topic: Is augmenting India's AI compute capacity needed?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw stated on July 13, 2026, that India will augment its computing capacity for the growing AI ecosystem.

all_candidates.topic: Is GST AATO amendment window shift helpful?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The GSTN revised the Annual Aggregate Turnover (AATO) amendment window for FY 2025-26 to July 1-31, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is containerized fly ash transport effective?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Indian Railways announced a new policy on July 14, 2026, for container-based transportation of fly ash to reduce pollution.

all_candidates.topic: Is new wagon design policy beneficial for freight?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 14-15, 2026, Indian Railways introduced a new wagon design policy to encourage innovation in freight wagons.
